headline: Brandi Carlile Joins Austin City Limits Hall of Fame in Star-Studded Tribute
lede: Grammy-winning artist Brandi Carlile will make music history this summer as she enters the Austin City Limits Hall of Fame, with legendary singer Bonnie Raitt set to induct her in a landmark television event.
body:
The Austin City Limits stage is preparing for a momentous celebration that bridges generations of musical excellence. Carlile's induction represents a pivotal milestone for the long-running music performance series, highlighting her significant contributions to contemporary folk and rock music.

Raitt's involvement adds extraordinary depth to the upcoming tribute. The two-time Grammy winner will not only deliver the induction speech but also perform a special duet with Carlile, promising an unforgettable musical moment for fans and viewers.

Carlile, known for her powerful vocals and genre-spanning artistry, has consistently pushed musical boundaries since her debut. Her multiple Grammy Awards and critically acclaimed albums have positioned her as a transformative figure in modern music, making her Hall of Fame induction a natural progression of her remarkable career.

The special episode, set to be taped this summer, will capture a once-in-a-lifetime musical conversation between two iconic artists. Fans can expect an intimate, electrifying performance that celebrates Carlile's artistic journey and her profound impact on contemporary music.
key_facts: Special episode to be taped summer 2026
Carlile is a multiple Grammy Award winner
